'''K'yne Harmion''' was an executive who worked for [[Gastess' Finance, Inc.]] Like his brothers [[Halleb Harmion|Halleb]] and [[Sarell Harmion|Sarell]], his specialty was taking over the operations of corporations which the ruthless financier [[Sarlim Gastess]] had acquired. He enjoyed taking a well-run company, stripping it for short-term [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and leaving it behind once Gastess' Finance was finished with it. His wife and family enjoyed seeing the destruction he and his corporation left in their wake.
